amendment: After the isolated target refresh but before the first successful analyzer run, added the omitted historical-blunder input hashes needed to reproduce the fixed production baseline and made the predeclared beta-binomial retry shrinkage prior explicit. Cohort rules, candidates, metrics, thresholds, and outputs were unchanged.
objective: Test whether game-like, continuation-CPL, first-answer illegality, and retry evidence improve robust rating prediction beyond the fixed production predictor.

inputs.game_results_source: production Firestore read by the guarded validation-only recalculation

validation_target.method: Replay production game results with the current benchmark prediction as the prior mean and RD 300.
validation_target.circularity_warning: The target still shares the benchmark prior mean; higher RD reduces but does not eliminate circularity.

common: Current 50-row core at Stockfish depth at least 30
At least 8 production games in the RD-300 validation target
cohort_rules.game_like: Common rules plus all 48 current game-like rows at Stockfish depth at least 30.
cohort_rules.continuation: Common rules plus a ready stratified-v2 continuation record with 8 selected starts, at least 24 scored/attempted model moves, score depth at least 10, and zero API errors.
cohort_rules.all_panels: Intersection of the game-like and continuation cohorts.

family_grouping.rule: Longest known model-line prefix, with gpt-5.6-luna, gpt-5.6-terra, and gpt-5.6-sol treated as separate families; reasoning levels of one line remain in the same family.
family_grouping.purpose: Every learned prediction for a configuration is trained without any configuration from its model-line family.

fixed_candidates: continuous game-like deadband: min(core, game_like + 150), followed by the analogous continuation-cap deadband

learned_candidates.method: Outer leave-one-family-out residual ridge around the fixed production prediction; ridge strength is selected only inside each outer training fold by inner leave-one-family-out MAE.

game_like_categories: log1p capped mean CPL in advantage_conversion
log1p capped mean CPL in defense
log1p capped mean CPL in quiet_equal
log1p capped mean CPL in tactical_equal
legality: pooled first-answer illegal rate across available automatic panels
conditional retry failure rate with beta-binomial shrinkage
continuation: pooled first-answer illegal rate across all automatic panels
conditional retry failure rate with beta-binomial shrinkage

metrics.primary: Unweighted MAE against the RD-300 validation rating
secondary: family-cluster bootstrap probability of improving MAE

research_recommendation_gate.effect_if_passed: Recommend a separately frozen independent validation; do not change production.
research_recommendation_gate.effect_if_failed: Retain current production predictor and use feature results only to prioritize future acquisition.
